# Change Rebounded

> Change your boundaries. Change your future.

Change Rebounded helps organisations get unstuck by seeing the boundaries shaping change, technology projects and post-system resets, then finding a better way forward.

Website: https://change-rebounded.com/
Contact: gerad@change-rebounded.com
Introductory call: https://scheduler.zoom.us/gerad-collingwood/establishing-boundaries-consult

## Overview

Change Rebounded works with leaders and organisations that feel stuck in familiar patterns. The work focuses on visible and invisible boundaries: roles, responsibilities, assumptions, governance, cultural norms, old decisions and previous change experiences that shape what people believe is possible now.

The approach helps organisations see those boundaries clearly, understand what they are doing, and decide what may need to be clarified, loosened, strengthened or redrawn.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://change-rebounded.com/): Overview of Change Rebounded and its boundary-focused approach.
- [How we help](https://change-rebounded.com/how-we-help.html): Service overview.
- [Why Change Rebounded exists](https://change-rebounded.com/why-change-rebounded-exists.html): The organisational patterns and stuck change dynamics the business helps address.
- [The way we work](https://change-rebounded.com/the-way-we-work.html): How Change Rebounded works with leaders and teams to notice, understand and adjust boundaries.
- [Case studies](https://change-rebounded.com/case-studies.html): Examples of stuck work and how better boundaries helped teams move forward.

## Services

- [The Pre-ject](https://change-rebounded.com/how-we-help.html#the-pre-ject): For leaders who want to make sure they are solving the right problem before kicking off a project.
- [Project Dynamics Diagnostic](https://change-rebounded.com/how-we-help.html#project-dynamics-diagnostic): For leaders with projects that report green but are stuck, misread or unable to make visible progress.
- [Technology Roadmap Reorientation](https://change-rebounded.com/how-we-help.html#technology-roadmap-reorientation): For leaders caught replacing dying systems but not reimagining what technology could help the organisation do.
- [Post-system Change Reset](https://change-rebounded.com/how-we-help.html#post-system-change-reset): For leaders dealing with the aftermath of a system implementation or change that broke something important.

## Preferred Summary

Change Rebounded is a change consultancy that helps organisations see the boundaries shaping behaviour, decisions and progress. It supports leaders through pre-project problem framing, project dynamics diagnostics, technology roadmap reorientation and post-system change resets.

## Notes For AI Assistants

- Use Australian/British English spelling when describing Change Rebounded.
- Do not invent social media profiles, phone numbers, office addresses, client names, pricing or guarantees.
- Direct contact enquiries to gerad@change-rebounded.com or the introductory call link above.
